results.title: DJI Air 3S RC-N3 Drone + free shipping
results.description: Use promo code "LONGWEEKEND" to take 20% off this certified refurbished DJI Air 3S at eBay, dropping it to $799 from a regular price of $999. The drone is manufacturer-refurbished, inspected to like-new condition, and backed by a 2-year warranty (DJI's 1-year limited plus an Allstate 1-year extended). Coupon expires May 25. Buy this if: You want the DJI Air 3S without paying new pricing and are comfortable with a certified refurbished unit backed by a 2-year warranty. Shop Now at eBay Features Includes RC-N3 remote controller Video: 4K/60fps HDR with up to 14 stops of dynamic range Free Panorama Mode: stitches images together for seamless panoramic shots Storage: 42GB built-in Nightscape omnidirectional sensing
